# Building Secure Health Platforms

Security is paramount when dealing with health data. In this post, we explore the key principles that guide our approach to building secure health platforms.

## Core Principles

### Data Encryption

All data must be encrypted both in transit and at rest. We use industry-standard encryption protocols to ensure that sensitive health information remains protected.

### Access Control

Implementing robust access control mechanisms ensures that only authorized users can access specific data. Role-based access control (RBAC) is essential.

### Audit Trails

Every action within the system is logged and auditable. This transparency is crucial for maintaining trust and meeting regulatory requirements.

## Looking Forward

As technology evolves, so do our security practices. We remain committed to staying ahead of emerging threats and continuously improving our security posture.
